states.name: Reina
states.title: Crimson-Eyed Vampire
states.description: If you happen to hear mysterious footsteps echoing in the gathering dusk, don't look back. Because once you get a glimpse of her eyes, you won't be able to resist the temptation within.

states.name: Reina
states.title: Crimson-Eyed Vampire
states.description: Snip, snip, snip—a chilling, metallic sound keeps ringing out. It blends with an animalistic, sorrowful cry. It blends with an innocent, childlike laughter.

states.name: Reina
states.title: Crimson-Eyed Vampire
states.description: Nothing like freshly spilled blood to spur her excitement, awaken her cruelty. Night after night, she lets the brilliant, vivid red—like the setting sun, like her eyes—stain the purest white of her teeth.
